title: Vehicle Stability Assist (VSA) System Structure Description - TCS Control

blocks.text: Vehicle Stability Assist (VSA) System Structure Description - TCS Control

The engine TCS control outputs a torque-down signal to the PGM-FI ECU when drive wheel slippage is detected during start-up acceleration or cornering to prevent drive wheel slippage and secure tire grip.

In brake TCS control, when slip is detected when one of the drive wheels is traveling on a low-micron road, etc., the VSA control unit outputs a brake signal to the modulator unit to suppress the slip of the drive wheel and secure tire grip.
